あ、司令官さん。すいません、さっきまでみんなが部屋に集まってたもので……<br>:
Ah, Commander. Sorry, everyone was gathered in my room until just
now... Maybe it was noisy...?
みんな、わたしが元居た世界のことに興味津々みたいで……<br>スマホとか、コンビ:
Everyone seemed really interested in my original world...
Smartphones, convenience stores, games, amusement parks...
え？ わたしが、迷惑じゃないかって……？<br>ううん、そんなことないかな？ 全: Huh? If I'm being a nuisance...? No, not at all. It's totally fine!♪
わたしはわたしで、こっちの世界のお話をいっぱい聞けて、<br>おとぎ話みたいで楽:
As for me, I get to hear so many stories about this world—it's like a
fairy tale, and it's fun, and I'm learning a lot...
まだまだ慣れないことも多いけれど、<br>少しずつ、こっちの世界に慣れていけたら:
I'm still not used to a lot of things, but little by little, I'd like to get
used to this world... That's what I think...
